# The Divine Hima

> A boutique luxury hotel in Dharamshala offering premium rooms, world-class dining, and breathtaking mountain views near the Norbulingka Institute.

## Rooms

- [Our Rooms](https://thedivinehima.com/rooms): Detailed information about our boutique luxury rooms and suites in Dharamshala, designed for comfort and tranquility.

## Dining

- [Dining Experience](https://thedivinehima.com/dining): Information on our world-class dining, menu, culinary experiences, and restaurant ambiance.

## Gallery

- [Gallery](https://thedivinehima.com/gallery): Visual showcase of The Divine Hima's exterior, interior, rooms, and beautiful Himalayan surroundings.

## About & Contact

- [About Us](https://thedivinehima.com/about): The story behind The Divine Hima, founded by Sanjay Kumbkarni, and our commitment to luxury hospitality.
- [Contact](https://thedivinehima.com/contact): Location details, email, phone number, and directions to The Divine Hima in Sidhpur.
- [Blog](https://thedivinehima.com/blog): Latest articles, travel guides, and updates from Dharamshala and The Divine Hima.

## Key Facts

- Located in Sidhpur, Dharamshala, opposite the Norbulingka Institute.
- Offers premium luxury accommodations with Himalayan views.
- Owned by Sanjay Kumbkarni.
- Amenities include free WiFi, an in-house restaurant, and parking.
- Star Rating: 4.5 Stars
- Phone: +918626983777
- Cuisine: Highlights local Himachali, North Indian, and international cuisines.

## Contact

- Website: https://thedivinehima.com
- Phone: +918626983777
- Address: Opposite Norbulingka Institute, Sidhpur, Dharamshala, HP 176057, India
